_doc: Rival King — stationary HP target placed at the center of each rival base. Damageable: when all 3 rival kings die, the player wins. Visual: flag-pole with a red banner (mirrors the player's Kingdom Flag but in rival livery). No ContactDamage — rival soldiers around the king do the fighting. Movement carried only for the faction tag (speed 0, controller 'hero_ai' is ignored by MovementSystem; absent HeroAI keeps HeroAISystem from steering it).
